misc: Runs his mouth all the time
Constantly sees birds and other wildlife on the course
Might stand on the ball for quite some time in the tee box
biography: Juuso, a Hyvinkään Golf stalwart, is set to make his ninth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Juuso's enthusiasm for the game remains undiminished.

Known for his loquacious nature on the course, Juuso is never one to shy away from sharing his thoughts, observations, and perhaps a few tall tales with his fellow competitors. His keen eye for the fauna of the course is also well-documented, with Juuso frequently pointing out various birds and wildlife that others might miss amid the intensity of the competition.

Opponents should be aware that Juuso is famous for his long preparation on the tee box. He may stand on the ball for quite some time before hitting, so it is important to be patient when playing with him.
